mapper.insert: insert into chat_message(conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, msg_type, content, order_id, goods_id, client_msg_id, status, create_time) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{msgType}, #{content}, #{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{clientMsgId}, #{status}, now())
mapper.select: select id, conversation_id, sender_id, receiver_id, msg_type, content, order_id, goods_id, client_msg_id, status, create_time, deliver_time, read_time from chat_message where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and status = 0 order by id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update chat_message set status = 1, deliver_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 0
